seo_content:
Finotive Funding 25% OFF Deal

Finotive Funding is welcoming new traders with an exclusive 25% discount on their first challenge using code FIRST25. This new-user promotion makes an already competitive prop firm even more accessible, while also introducing you to their innovative Finotive Pay application — a proprietary payment system that streamlines weekly withdrawals and gives funded traders faster, more reliable access to their profits.

Finotive Funding is a Cyprus-based proprietary trading firm known for blending cutting-edge technology with institutional trading conditions. The firm has built a strong reputation in the European prop trading community for operational reliability, weekly payout cycles, and the development of their own payment infrastructure — Finotive Pay — which removes third-party dependency from the withdrawal process.

With code FIRST25, new traders receive 25% off their first challenge fee — a meaningful discount that reduces the barrier to entry and reflects Finotive's commitment to attracting and retaining serious traders. Once funded, you gain access to weekly withdrawals processed through Finotive Pay, which is significantly faster than the bi-monthly or monthly cycles common at many competing firms.

Finotive Funding's trading conditions are built around a professional two-step evaluation with defined profit targets and drawdown limits. The firm supports a range of forex and CFD instruments, and their Cyprus technology hub provides a stable operational environment with strong regulatory oversight. The Finotive Pay app integrates directly into your funded account dashboard for seamless profit extraction.

To activate this deal, click the affiliate link above to Finotive Funding, register as a new user, select your preferred challenge account, and enter FIRST25 at checkout. The 25% discount will be applied immediately to your order. This code is valid for first-time purchases only — subsequent challenges are not eligible for the new-user rate.
